description: Marks temporal relationships where the object of the postposition occurs later than the reference point. As the postpositional twin of the conjunction, 'phoe' allows temporal precedence to modify nouns rather than link clauses, acknowledging how past and future define each other through their relationship.
sound_symbolism: The word begins with 'pho', where the gentle fricative 'ɸ' releases time like breath into space, while the round 'o' holds the fullness of the present moment. This fullness then focuses backward into 'e', like memory reaching for what came before. The vowel sequence from open present to focused past mirrors how we experience 'before'—standing in our current fullness while orienting toward what preceded. The reversed vowel order from its partner 'pheo' creates a sonic mirror, making temporal direction audible.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a temporal postposition taking noun phrase objects, distinct from its conjunctional use. Follows the noun it modifies: 'dawn phoe' (dawn-before = before dawn), 'rains phoe' (rains-before = before the rains), 'understanding phoe' (understanding-before = before understanding). Marks time relationships without implying causation—temporal precedence does not equal cause. Often appears in postpositional phrases modifying nouns or in adverbial position modifying entire clauses.

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Cyclical time means 'before' is also 'coming again'—before winter means after autumn but also approaching spring. 'Phoe' carries this spiral understanding where past and future curve toward each other in eternal return.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: The word acknowledges that 'before' exists only in relation to 'after'—temporal markers are conceptual tools, not absolute realities. The gentle articulation reminds us to hold time lightly, as useful convention rather than fixed truth.
pillars.solarpunk-values: Sustainable transitions require understanding what groundwork comes before transformation—soil building before planting, community organizing before system change. 'Phoe' serves the patient work of preparation that makes regenerative futures possible.
